TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Salome Zourabichvili ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 3, Salome Zourabichvili, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Georgia ta' misuw hya' ga Salome Zourabichvili, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Salome Zourabichvili minkahul sa Paris na France. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1952 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: s~ɕalome zouraβiʦ~ʨħ*ili rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, s~ɕalome zouraβiʦ~ʨħ*ili, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣeorɣia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕalome zouraβiʦ~ʨħ*ili, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral s~ɕalome zouraβiʦ~ʨħ*ili minkaħul s~ɕa paris~ɕ na *ranʦ~ʨe. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
S.FORM: Salome Zourabichvili ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 3, Salome Zourabichvili, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Georgia ta' misuw hya' ga Salome Zourabichvili, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Salome Zourabichvili minkahul sa Paris na France. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1952 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

(minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣeorɣia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕalome zouraβiʦ~ʨħ*ili, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral s~ɕalome zouraβiʦ~ʨħ*ili minkaħul s~ɕa paris~ɕ na *ranʦ~ʨe. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
